# WandSparkles

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::WandSparkles;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        WandSparkles { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
magic, wizard, magician

## Categories
design, gaming, cursors, photography

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/wand-sparkles)
